rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Command Shell Suspicious Process Ancestry (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)

rules.rule_text:
title: Command Shell Suspicious Process Ancestry (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)
id: 60cb2beb-d2ba-4a47-ad68-e97576985c70
status: experimental
description: Detects IIS worker process spawning command shell. Part of the RedCanary
  2023 Threat Detection Report.
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/windows-command-shell/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2023/05/10
tags:
- attack.execution
- attack.t1059.003
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    ParentImage|endswith:
    - \w3wp.exe
    - \wmiprvse.exe
    Image|endswith: \cmd.exe
    CommandLine|contains:
    - http://
    - https://
    - echo
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
